input_ids: predict missing triple: Coburg Peak (, ) is the rocky peak rising to 783 m in Erul Heights on Trinity Peninsula in Graham Land, Antarctica. It is surmounting Cugnot Ice Piedmont to the northeast.The peak is named after the Bulgarian royal house of Coburg (Saxe-Coburg-Gotha), 1887–1946.  ⁇ S> [["Coburg Peak", "instance of", "Rocky peak"], ["Coburg Peak", "elevation", "783 m"], ["Coburg Peak", "location", "Erul Heights, Trinity Peninsula, Graham Land, Antarctica"], ["Coburg Peak", "surmounts", "Cugnot Ice Piedmont"], ["Coburg Peak", "named after", "Bulgarian royal house of Coburg (Saxe-Coburg-Gotha), 1887-1946"]]
